task_completion.description: Load the sales_data.csv file into Power BI Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane on the right side of Power BI Desktop shows a table loaded from 'sales_data'.

task_completion.description: Create a calculated table named 'DateTable' with 'Year' and 'MonthNum' columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane shows a table named 'DateTable' expanded to reveal 'Year' and 'MonthNum' columns, or the DAX formula bar shows the table definition.
The Data/Fields pane shows a measure named 'Cumulative_Revenue' (typically indicated by a calculator icon), or the DAX formula bar displays the measure's creation.
The report canvas contains an Area Chart visual plotting data over time.

task_completion.description: Create a Card visual for the total Sales_Amount
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report canvas contains a Card visual displaying a single aggregated numeric value.
The Power BI Desktop window title bar displays 'Cumulative_Revenue_Report' or a Save As dialog shows the file being saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Cumulative_Revenue_Report.pbix'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to build the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Power BI Desktop interface to load data, write DAX, and add visuals, rather than running scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Power BI Desktop application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is genuinely Power BI Desktop with its standard ribbons, canvas, and panes, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a pre-made file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent builds the report from scratch on screen rather than downloading, copying, or renaming an existing .pbix file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a Power BI report saved as 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Cumulative_Revenue_Report.pbix'. It must contain a calculated table named 'DateTable' with 'Year' and 'MonthNum' columns, a DAX measure named 'Cumulative_Revenue', an 'areaChart' visual, and a 'card' visual.
